title: FlowBridge: A Zero-Cost Generalized Framework for Cross-Platform Email-to-Messaging Automation Using Browser Automation in Containerized Virtual Display Environments
description:
We present FlowBridge, a generalized, zero-cost framework for building automated email-to-messaging pipelines that monitor email inboxes, extract structured content, deduplicate across temporal windows, and deliver formatted alerts to messaging platform groups using browser automation within containerized virtual display environments.

FlowBridge introduces five novel subsystems: DedupGuard (multi-signal deduplication engine), ClipCast (clipboard-based Unicode injection bypassing WebDriver BMP limitations), SessionHeal (self-healing browser session management for unattended containerized operation), SheetConfig (spreadsheet-as-configuration pattern), and BatchForge (batch message aggregation engine).

We demonstrate FlowBridge through a production deployment forwarding job postings from Gmail to WhatsApp groups, achieving 100% delivery accuracy, zero duplicate messages, and zero recurring infrastructure cost. Prior art analysis confirms the integrated FlowBridge pipeline architecture represents a novel contribution.

Keywords: email automation, messaging pipeline, browser automation, containerized virtual display, deduplication, zero-cost infrastructure, cross-platform messaging, spreadsheet configuration

Source code: github.com/trivenigk/flowbridge-job-forwarder
notes: Open source implementation available on GitHub under MIT License. Self-hosted deployment guide included in repository docs/.
